import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(n)
        result = list.push(result, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn dedupe(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if not list.contains(out, v)
        out = list.push(out, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    mut min_val = 0
    mut min_idx = 0
    mut found = false
    mut k = 0
    while k < remaining.len()
      match remaining.get(k)
      when Some(v)
        if not found
          min_val = v
          min_idx = k
          found = true
        else if v < min_val
          min_val = v
          min_idx = k
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      k = k + 1
    end
    sorted = list.push(sorted, min_val)
    mut next_remaining: List<Int> = []
    mut m = 0
    while m < remaining.len()
      if m != min_idx
        match remaining.get(m)
        when Some(v)
          next_remaining = list.push(next_remaining, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      m = m + 1
    end
    remaining = next_remaining
  end
  sorted
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end

  mut combined: List<Int> = parse_line(line1)
  let second = parse_line(line2)
  mut j = 0
  while j < second.len()
    match second.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      combined = list.push(combined, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  let unique = dedupe(combined)
  let sorted = sort_asc(unique)

  mut out = ""
  mut p = 0
  while p < sorted.len()
    match sorted.get(p)
    when Some(v)
      if p == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    p = p + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
